title: Tape 17: Pinewatch - 7 Day Immersion Sample
objective: Demonstrate full daily flow with narrative progression, clues, interactions, puzzle cadence, and immersion-aware personalization.

narrativeProgression.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.

evidenceDrops.title: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Day 01 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Frame glitch cluster.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch ARG artifact Day 01. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Frame glitch cluster. Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch police_report audio cue for day 1. Clue anchor: Frame glitch cluster. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Frame glitch cluster and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Frame glitch cluster.

distraction.title: Red Herring 01
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Frame glitch cluster with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle

Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with RANG.
